name: Cash Pickup
description: Requires cash pickup location. High density via retail agents.

name: Mobile Wallet
description: No bank account required, settles immediately via mobile rails.

name: Bank Deposit
description: Requires formal bank account and routing. High KYC check compliance.

name: Agent Network
description: Post-offices, grocery stores, gas stations. Critical in rural corridors.

name: Digital Account
description: Fintech accounts. High digital literacy requirement.
